tasks_completed.description: M1: Add tests/generated/, docs/codex/, *.png rules to dot-claude .gitignore
tasks_completed.changes: Appended 4 lines after /.claude/specs/spec-*/ (comment + 3 rules). !docs/dev/ at line 69 and !docs/reference/ at line 71 remain intact.
tasks_completed.rationale: Harness-generated dirs (tests/generated/, docs/codex/) and PNG screenshots were untracked noise. Root cause: no unified gitignore policy when harness deployed.

tasks_completed.description: M2: Add *.html and tests/generated/ rules to budget-management .gitignore
tasks_completed.changes: Appended comment block + *.html + tests/generated/ rules. *.html covers root-level asset-tracker.html and prevents future HTML artifact commits.
tasks_completed.rationale: budget-management had no *.html rule; asset-tracker.html (329KB) was auto-committed before gitignore policy was set.

tasks_completed.description: M2 BLOCKED: git rm --cached for budget-management tracked HTML files
tasks_completed.changes: BLOCKED by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook (line 824: rm is forbidden). The *.html gitignore rule IS present and correctly added. However, the three tracked HTML files (asset-tracker.html, output/dashboards/asset-tracker.html, output/dashboards/spending-dashboard.html) still appear in git ls-files.
tasks_completed.rationale: Hook blocks all rm commands including git rm --cached. User must run manually: git -C /root/budget-management rm --cached asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/spending-dashboard.html

tasks_completed.description: M3: Add docs/codex/, tests/generated/, data/*/sentiment-monitor/ to multi-asset-portfolio .gitignore
tasks_completed.changes: Appended 4 lines (comment + 3 rules) after qa-*.png rule.
tasks_completed.rationale: docs/codex/ and tests/generated/ dirs existed as untracked noise. data/*/sentiment-monitor/ dirs exist but had no rule.

tasks_completed.description: M4: Add tests/generated/, docs/codex/ rules to travel-planner .gitignore
tasks_completed.rationale: Both dirs had untracked content in git status.

tasks_completed.description: M5: Add tests/generated/ rule to knowledge-system-jade .gitignore
M6: Add tests/generated/ rule to feedbackforge .gitignore
M7 (BA numbering M8): Add docs/research/case-*/ rule to orchestra .gitignore
tasks_completed.changes: Appended 2 lines (comment + docs/research/case-*/ rule) after .codex/ rule. Used case-*/ pattern NOT bare docs/research/ to preserve tracking of INDEX.md and README.md.
tasks_completed.rationale: docs/research/case-39742/ was untracked noise. INDEX.md and README.md at docs/research/ level remain tracked.

tasks_completed.changes: Added two elements to mcpServers.playwright.args array: --output-dir and /tmp/playwright-screenshots. Args now: [--cdp-endpoint, http://127.0.0.1:8080, --output-dir, /tmp/playwright-screenshots].
tasks_completed.rationale: Playwright screenshots were landing in working tree without --output-dir isolation.

tasks_completed.changes: Created new idempotent SessionStart hook. Detects git root via git rev-parse, checks for .claude/ dir, appends 4 standard harness rules if absent (grep-before-append per rule). Exits 0 always.
tasks_completed.rationale: Infrastructure layer to prevent future gitignore gaps across any project repo with .claude/.

tasks_completed.description: M10 (BA numbering M11): Register session-gitignore-propagate.sh in settings.json SessionStart
tasks_completed.changes: Added new entry to SessionStart hooks array with timeout: 10.
tasks_completed.rationale: Hook must be registered to be invoked at session start.

scripts_created.purpose: Idempotent SessionStart hook appending standard harness gitignore rules to project repos with .claude/ directory
parameters: none — reads CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR env var or PWD
scripts_created.usage: Invoked automatically at SessionStart by Claude Code harness

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: 89771b3 — Auto-commit: 2026-03-18 09:29:13 (budget-management asset-tracker.html entered index via auto-commit cron before *.html rule was in .gitignore)
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: No unified gitignore policy when harness was deployed across repos. Prior cycle (20260518-214050) fixed individual symptoms but missed: (a) several rule-repo combinations, (b) no propagation mechanism, (c) tracked binary artifact.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Adds missing rules to all 7 files, adds *.html rule to block future HTML artifact commits, creates infrastructure-layer hook that automatically propagates standard harness rules to any new project repo with .claude/.

blocking_issues.description: git rm --cached blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook (line 824: 'rm is forbidden'). The *.html rule in budget-management .gitignore is correctly added, preventing future HTML commits. But the three tracked HTML files (asset-tracker.html, output/dashboards/asset-tracker.html, output/dashboards/spending-dashboard.html) still appear in git ls-files and must be removed manually.
blocking_issues.user_action_required: Run this manually: git -C /root/budget-management rm --cached asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/spending-dashboard.html
blocking_issues.ac_affected: AC2 — git ls-files will still return non-empty until user runs git rm --cached manually

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: Overage is 4 lines of comment blocks added for clarity in gitignore files (# Dev harness output ... and # harness-propagated ... prefixes). These are standard gitignore practice and align with the existing style in the modified files.

dev.qa_notes: AC2 (budget-management git ls-files empty) is partially blocked — the *.html gitignore rule IS present but git rm --cached was blocked by the safety hook. User must run git rm --cached manually (see blocking_issues B1). All other ACs (AC1, AC3, AC4, AC5, AC6, AC7, AC8) should pass. Hook idempotency can be verified by reading /root/travel-planner/.gitignore (tests/generated/ appears exactly once). Orchestra docs/research/INDEX.md and README.md remain tracked (git ls-files docs/research/INDEX.md should return the file).

permissions_to_add.reason: Allow execution of new harness gitignore propagation hook created by this dev cycle

blast_radius_declarations.reason: gitignore rule additions only — no code logic changed, no importers
SessionStart hook registration only — additive, no existing hooks removed or modified

New hook — no existing callers. Only invoked at SessionStart. Idempotency verified by design (grep-before-append pattern). Direct execution test blocked by safety hook; hook logic is verifiable by code inspection.

self_verification.notes: Verified: (1) grep confirms all 3 rules in dot-claude .gitignore with !docs/dev/ and !docs/reference/ intact; (2) git check-ignore tests/generated/foo/bar.py exits 0; (3) git check-ignore docs/dev/ticket.md exits 1; (4) all per-project .gitignore rules confirmed present; (5) .claude.json playwright args verified via python3 JSON parse; (6) hook file exists and is executable (chmod 755); (7) settings.json registration confirmed. PARTIAL: git rm --cached blocked by safety hook — documented in blocking_issues B1.

recommendations: User must run: git -C /root/budget-management rm --cached asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/spending-dashboard.html (blocked by safety hook in subagent context)
Consider adding 'Bash(git rm --cached:*)' to settings.json allow list to enable future git rm --cached operations by subagents for index-only file untracking
The new session-gitignore-propagate.sh hook will automatically add standard harness rules to any new project repo with .claude/ on session start
